test\_pytest.py::test\_01\_get\_customers  
Test Case 1: Retrieve Customer List  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/customers  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: GET  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: \[{"customer\_id": 1, "name": "Acme Corp", "company\_name": "Acme Tractors"}\]  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: \[{"customer\_id": 1, "name": "Acme Corp", "company\_name": "Acme Tractors"}\]  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image1]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_02\_create\_enquiry  
Test Case 2: Create a New Enquiry  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/enquiries  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"customer\_id": 1}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Enquiry created successfully", "enquiry\_id": 2, "status": "New"}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Enquiry created successfully", "enquiry\_id": 2, "status": "New"}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image2]

test\_pytest.py::test\_03\_generate\_quotation  
Test Case 3: Generate Quotation  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/enquiries/2/quotations  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"price": 1200.5, "est\_delivery": "2026-05-15"}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Quotation generated", "quote\_id": 2}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 404  
    \- JSON: {"error": {"code": 404, "message": "Enquiry ID 2 not found."}}  
Result: Failed  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
FAILED  
![][image3]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_04\_revise\_quotation  
Test Case 4: Revise Quotation  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/quotations/1/revise  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"price": 1400.0}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Quotation revised to version 2", "new\_quote\_id": 3}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Quotation revised to version 2", "new\_quote\_id": 2}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image4]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_05\_accept\_quotation  
Test Case 5: Accept Quotation (Create Order)  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/quotations/1/accept  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"spring\_id": 1}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Quotation accepted and Order confirmed", "order\_id": 3}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Quotation accepted and Order confirmed", "order\_id": 3}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image5]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_06\_get\_materials  
Test Case 6: Check Material Inventory  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/materials  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: GET  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: \[{"material\_id": 1, "name": "Steel Wire", "specification": null, "stock\_quantity": 100.0}\]  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: \[{"material\_id": 1, "name": "Steel Wire", "specification": null, "stock\_quantity": 100.0}\]  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image6]

test\_pytest.py::test\_07\_schedule\_task  
Test Case 7: Schedule Task (Epic 2\)  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/tasks  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"order\_id": 3, "machine\_id": 1, "material\_id": 1, "scheduled\_at": "2026-05-01T10:00:00", "material\_required": 20.0}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Production task scheduled and materials reserved", "task\_id": 1}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Production task scheduled and materials reserved", "task\_id": 1}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image7]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_08\_update\_task\_status  
Test Case 8: Update Production Progress  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/tasks/1/status  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: PUT  
    \- JSON: {"status": "In Progress"}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Task status updated to In Progress"}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Task status updated to In Progress"}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image8]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_09\_quality\_control  
Test Case 9: Submit Quality Report  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/tasks/1/quality  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"inspector": "Mike Foreman", "result": "Approved"}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Quality report recorded: Approved", "report\_id": 1}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Quality report recorded: Approved", "report\_id": 1}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image9]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_10\_generate\_invoice  
Test Case 10: Generate Invoice for Order  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/orders/1/invoice  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"manual\_amount": 1050.0}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Invoice generated successfully", "invoice\_id": 2, "amount": 1050.0}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Invoice generated successfully", "invoice\_id": 2, "amount": 1050.0}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image10]

test\_pytest.py::test\_11\_pay\_invoice  
Test Case 11: Mark Invoice as Paid  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/invoices/1/pay  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: PUT  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Invoice successfully marked as paid"}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Invoice successfully marked as paid"}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image11]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_12\_dispatch\_shipment  
Test Case 12: Dispatch Shipment  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/orders/2/shipment  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {"carrier": "UPS", "tracking\_number": "UPS987654"}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Order dispatched", "shipment\_id": 2}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 201  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Order dispatched", "shipment\_id": 2}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image12]

test\_pytest.py::test\_13\_record\_delivery  
Test Case 13: Record Delivery Status  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/shipments/1/delivery  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: PUT  
    \- JSON: {"delivery\_status": "Delivered & Accepted"}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Delivery updated: Delivered & Accepted"}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"message": "Delivery updated: Delivered & Accepted"}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image13]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_14\_financial\_analytics  
Test Case 14: Get Financial Analytics  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/analytics/financials  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: GET  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"metrics": {"total\_revenue": 1500.0, "collected\_revenue": 0.0, "pending\_revenue": 1500.0}, "chart\_data": {"labels": \["Collected Revenue", "Pending Revenue"\], "series": \[0.0, 1500.0\]}}        
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"metrics": {"total\_revenue": 1500.0, "collected\_revenue": 0.0, "pending\_revenue": 1500.0}, "chart\_data": {"labels": \["Collected Revenue", "Pending Revenue"\], "series": \[0.0, 1500.0\]}}        
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image14]  
test\_pytest.py::test\_15\_production\_analytics  
Test Case 15: Get Production Analytics  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/analytics/production  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: GET  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"machine\_utilization": {"chart\_type": "bar", "labels": \[\], "data": \[\]}, "production\_pipeline": {"chart\_type": "pie", "data": {"Invoiced \- Pending Dispatch": 1, "Quality Approved \- Ready for Billing": 1}}}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 200  
    \- JSON: {"machine\_utilization": {"chart\_type": "bar", "labels": \[\], "data": \[\]}, "production\_pipeline": {"chart\_type": "pie", "data": {"Invoiced \- Pending Dispatch": 1, "Quality Approved \- Ready for Billing": 1}}}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image15]

test\_pytest.py::test\_16\_validation\_failure  
Test Case 16: Validation Check (Not Found)  
Page being tested: http://127.0.0.1:5000/api/v1/orders/3/invoice  
Inputs:  
    \- Request Method: POST  
    \- JSON: {}  
    \- Header: Content-Type: application/json  
Expected Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 404  
    \- JSON: {"error": {"code": 404, "message": "Order ID 3 not found"}}  
Actual Output:  
    \- HTTP Status Code: 404  
    \- JSON: {"error": {"code": 404, "message": "Order ID 3 not found"}}  
Result: Success  
\----------------------------------------------------------------------  
PASSED  
![][image16]
